decisions.format_shape: AUTHOR OK'd: keep `from` a single string (e.g. 'Maria and Tomas'); add optional writers:[...]. Additive optional field, token seed (from-string) UNCHANGED, SPEC stays 0.1, existing fixtures byte-identical. Same pattern as encryption/media.
decisions.voices: AUTHOR OK'd: merged voice default (one letter, two names); offer an 'alternating turns' mode that inserts labelled turns as plain text.
decisions.token_break: DEFERRED: the three-way token break (two keeper halves) is Step 3, a /token-lab decision on rendered visual evidence — NOT in this ledger. Co-written letters authenticate on the existing 2-half token meanwhile.

Verify: node --check landing/landing.js. Idempotent: #setup-cowrite present.

summary: v0.3 Task 5 co-written letters — FORMAT + COMPOSE COMPLETE on dev (unreleased). c1 writers[] format event (e87c0e1), c2 compose UI (a570373), c3 QA+docs. from stays the seed-bearing string; writers[] additive optional; single-writer byte-identical; browser-verified. DEFERRED: the three-way token break (Step 3) = a /token-lab session (visual evidence). Task 6 (grief) gated on an outside reader. Author's gated next step: /release (version bump + main promotion). .checkpoint/ may be deleted or kept.
